items.title: Shirts + Hats + Bags + More!
items.description:
Cameron's Tiny Porch 2026 design was voted by the neighbrohood to represent Tiny Porch 2026! 

Be sure to check out our[ Bonfire Store](https://www.bonfire.com/store/tiny-porch---woodland-heights---2026/) to order this year's shirts plus other merch to use season to season! 

**As always, 100% of proceeds from orders go to support the performing artists donating their time and talents to Woodland Heights!**
